Text.Page:
A hero needs more than just courage...a mighty weapon, for instance!

, I can help you be the hero you were meant to be. Win seven times in Corsairs' Stronghold, and I'll reward you with a weapon fit for a hero.

Finished already? Well done you!

Here's the weapon I promised—all yours, to customize however you please!

I envy you the adventures you'll have with this weapon by your side, !
